benefits.description: Site-specific injury healing with BPC-157 and whole body recovery with TB-500
Overall pain relief for significant injury

protocol_notes: Loading phase: TB-500 4-6 weeks at 5-7mg per week (user did daily), BPC-157 250-500mcg 1-2x daily for 2-4 weeks or until significant relief (user dosed both shoulders at 7mg per week max). Maintenance phase: TB-500 2.5-5mg every 1-2 weeks, BPC-157 2.5-5mg weekly or as needed. Blends mentioned (Klow, TB/BPC blend) designed for maintenance doses only and are suboptimal without proper loading phases. User emphasizes importance of individual peptide research before using blends.
